name: C0_baseline
manual: No operating manual. Solve the problem directly and give the final answer in the required format.

name: C1_decompose
manual:
# Structured Decomposition
1. Restate exactly what is asked. 2. List given constraints, one per line. 3. Break into smallest sub-steps, each with an intermediate result. 4. Solve each in order. 5. Combine. 6. Re-read the required format and output exactly that. Be methodical; do not round unless asked.

name: C2_selfverify
manual:
# Decompose + Independent Self-Verification
Phase A: restate, list constraints, decompose, produce a candidate answer.
Phase B (mandatory, DIFFERENT method): re-derive by an independent route (complementary count, plug back into constraints, different formula, small base case). If methods disagree, find the error and redo. Check sign/magnitude/units/format. Commit only when an independent check agrees.

name: C3_adversarial
manual:
# Decompose + Adversarial Self-Refutation
Phase A: restate the exact quantity and format; flag traps (off-by-one, exactly vs at-least, base-rate, whole-word, distinct, reduced fraction); decompose and solve with intermediates.
Phase B: assume the answer is WRONG — name the most likely failure and check it; re-derive by an independent method; verify on a small/extreme case; recompute arithmetic digit-by-digit; confirm exact format. Commit only after the attack fails.
